name: Pulse
description: The largest customer success conference in the world. Covers CS strategy, retention frameworks, NRR growth, and the Gainsight platform ecosystem.

name: SuccessConnect
description: SAP's customer success and HCM conference. Relevant for CS professionals in enterprise environments managing complex customer relationships and outcomes.

name: Customer Success Festival
description: Global CS festival with sessions on CS strategy, metrics, team building, and career development. Practical and community-driven format.

name: CSM Practice Summit
description: Intimate summit focused on CSM best practices. Covers playbook design, onboarding optimization, health scoring, and scaling CS operations.

name: BIG RYG
description: ChurnZero's customer success conference. Focused on reducing churn, automating CS workflows, and building data-driven customer health programs.

name: TSIA World
description: Covers the full post-sale lifecycle including customer success, support, professional services, and subscription economics. Research-driven benchmarks and frameworks.

name: Customer Success Network Conference
description: Community-focused CS conference designed for practitioner networking and knowledge sharing. Smaller format with high-quality peer connections.

name: SaaStr Annual
description: The largest SaaS conference globally. Strong CS track covering net revenue retention, expansion playbooks, and the role of CS in SaaS growth strategy.

name: Totango Customer Success Summit
description: Totango's annual summit on customer success operations. Covers composable CS architecture, SuccessBLOCs, health scoring, and automation at scale.

name: CustomerX Conference
description: Focused on the intersection of customer success and customer experience. Covers journey mapping, voice of customer programs, and CX-driven retention strategies.

name: Catalyst Connect
description: Catalyst's user conference for CS professionals. Covers CS platform best practices, workflow automation, and data-driven customer management.

name: CS100 Summit
description: Exclusive, invite-only summit for top CS leaders. Intimate setting for senior CS executives to discuss strategy, organizational design, and industry direction.
